title: saxifraga hirculus subsp. propinqua
intro: Saxifraga hirculus subsp. propinqua, also known as the woolly saxifrage, is a plant species that belongs to the Saxifragaceae family and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Saxifraga hirculus subsp. propinqua include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is typically harvested in the summer months when the leaves and flowers are in full bloom.
